svg.title: Ligconsolata Next
svg.desc: A left-right comparison graphic showing 79 Ligconsolata Next samples. The left side is shaped from a smoke-built font with liga, dlig, and calt enabled, and the right side is the same raw ASCII source with ligatures disabled.
svg.text: Left: Ligconsolata Next shaping. Right: raw ASCII. Representative samples, not the full Fira Code feature set.
左侧为 Ligconsolata Next 连字渲染，右侧为原始 ASCII；这里只展示代表性样例，不是完整 Fira Code 特性集。
Actual font shaping / 真实字体渲染

g.text: Advance width preserved / 保持等宽
liga + dlig + calt verified / 特性已验证
